widgets_values:
MAIN FLOW - Wave42 image generation canvas
Canonical superseding workflow for the image-generation section. Built from the planned layout pages and the existing SDXL/RealVisXL + Flux-family runtime templates.
Executable lanes: SDXL/RealVisXL with organized Wave42 LoRA stack, Flux-family/Z-Image lane, and Flux-to-SDXL support pass.
low quality, blurry, distorted anatomy, extra fingers, artifacts, text, watermark, plastic skin
blurry, low resolution, smeared texture, visible mask edge, harsh boundary, changed face, changed background, mismatched lighting, color shift, warped region, noisy artifacts, text, watermark
low quality, blurry, melted details, changed identity, changed pose, watermark, text, overprocessed, waxy skin
low quality, blurry, artifacts, distorted anatomy, watermark, text

Reference / IPAdapter / ControlNet staging
The layout source calls for reference identity, pose/depth/edge/mask control, and regional inpaint. The face-reference IPAdapter branch is staged below as ready_to_verify from the prior smoke template. The Canny ControlNet edge-map branch is staged below as ready_to_verify. Additional reference-slot routing and pose/depth/openpose control maps remain notes until direct runtime proof exists.

Image QA / promotion export
Outputs are saved under Main_Flow/* prefixes so downstream QA, manifest intake, and tracker-promotion scripts can consume concrete image-generation artifacts instead of layout notes.

Video/audio handoff boundary
The Main Flow now produces image outputs ready for video lanes. WAN/Hunyuan/LTXV/audio remain separate runtime lanes until their own ComfyUI node graphs are merged and proven.

True Flux image-reference conditioning boundary
The true Flux Schnell reference-smoke/base lane is staged as ready_to_verify using the concrete Wave20 Flux smoke template. Actual image-reference conditioning remains note-only because current templates load or name references but do not wire reference pixels into generation.

Inpaint, upscale, QA, release promotion
Final image QA, manifest intake, and tracker promotion remain notes until proven. Basic RealESRGAN upscale and SDXL inpaint/detail are staged and wired as ready_to_verify.

IG-09 Image QA and evidence export
Run export_wave42_main_flow_image_evidence.py after Main_Flow images are generated. It records lane prefix, file path, size, SHA256, dimensions, format, and basic decode QA.

Evidence manifest output
Manifest path: Implementation/manifests/main_flow_image_qa_evidence/*.json. This is evidence intake, not tracker promotion by itself.

QA boundary
Basic file QA proves files are non-empty, decodable images with dimensions. Creative QA, runtime prompt proof, object_info visibility, and model-loader proof remain separate verification gates.

IG-10 Main Flow promotion after runtime proof
Run promote_wave42_main_flow_after_runtime_proof.py only after IG-09 finds exact Main_Flow outputs for the required lanes. Promotion is blocked until those runtime files exist.

Promotion decision output
Manifest path: Implementation/manifests/main_flow_promotion/*.json. Verified is allowed only when all required lanes have passing evidence records.

Current promotion boundary
If exact Main_Flow runtime outputs are absent, IG-10 must report blocked_missing_runtime_proof. It must not promote from layout notes or unrelated smoke outputs.

WAVE42 DEPLOYED LORA LIBRARY - MANIFEST WIRED, DISABLED BY DEFAULT
Source CSV: C:\Comfy_UI_Lora\Model_Organize\wave07\WAVE07_EC2_DEPLOY_MANIFEST.csv
Source manifest JSON: C:\Comfy_UI_Lora\Model_Organize\wave07\WAVE07_EC2_DEPLOY_MANIFEST.json
Registry: C:\Comfy_UI\Implementation\loras\wave42_lora_registry.json
Stack profiles: C:\Comfy_UI\Implementation\profiles\wave42_stack_profiles.json
This section represents every Wave07 deployed LoRA path in Main Flow as a disabled/disconnected LoraLoader node.
The executable production chain remains the existing linked 3-LoRA SDXL lane. Promote/select only compatible same-engine stacks; do not enable all library nodes at once.

wave42_main_flow.boundary: This is a ComfyUI UI workflow artifact. It wires only currently evidenced image-generation lanes plus the SDXL LoRA stack pending review; unverified branches are notes.

wave42_lora_library_wiring.mode: library nodes are disconnected and disabled by default; active production chain unchanged
wave42_lora_library_wiring.disabled_review_policy: represented for traceability with zero strengths and disabled mode; blocked from production stacks by profile rules

wave42_catalog_stack_presets.usage: Use generated catalog_* stack recipes to populate the active rgthree Lora Loader Stack node. Generated presets are same-engine/category chunks and require smoke testing before scene_verified promotion.
